advert.description: The Dulux logo is prominently displayed on a blue background in the final frame of the sequence.
The ChocoMel can is held by a person in the final shot before the scene changes to a man dancing, indicating the end of the commercial.
The promotional screen for the Merlin Annual Pass, including the website URL, is shown before transitioning to the next advertisement.
The Pot Noodle packaging is shown in a close-up shot with the slogan "Nothing satisfies like POT noodle" right before the channel logo appears.
